description: Skipped or extra beats felt in chest
advice: Record episodes. Avoid triggers. Consult cardiologist for Holter.

description: Orthopnoea — unable to breathe when supine
advice: Prop up with pillows. Urgent medical evaluation.

condition: Acute Pulmonary Oedema / Left Heart Failure
advice: Sit upright. Seek emergency help if severe.
Immediate evaluation required. Do not ignore.
Take medications as prescribed. Reduce salt and stress. Monitor daily.
Seek emergency care immediately. Do not drive yourself.
Lie flat with legs elevated. Hydrate. Call ambulance if unconscious.

description: Hands and feet cold even in warm conditions
advice: Keep warm. Avoid smoking. Consult vascular specialist.
Stretch legs before sleep. Stay hydrated. Review medications.

description: Calf pain on walking relieved by rest
advice: Exercise rehabilitation. Avoid smoking. Vascular referral.

condition: Low Oxygen Saturation / Heart Failure / PE
advice: Emergency evaluation immediately. Check SpO2.
Urgent cardiac evaluation required.

description: Rapid weight gain (>2 kg in 2 days)
advice: Report to cardiologist. Adjust diuretic if prescribed.
Investigate with blood tests. Rule out infection or malignancy.
Blood cultures and echocardiogram urgently required.
Call emergency services immediately — possible stroke.
FAST assessment. Call 112 immediately.
Emergency — call ambulance. Time is brain.

symptom: worsening headache at back of neck
advice: Emergency CT scan and evaluation required immediately.
Audiological assessment. Check medications. Monitor BP.

description: Unable to climb stairs or walk without breathlessness
advice: Cardiac workup. Pulmonary function tests. Graduated exercise.

condition: ACE Inhibitor Side Effect / Heart Failure
advice: If on ACE inhibitor, switch to ARB. Investigate further.
Investigate underlying cause. Ensure vaccinations up to date.

description: Right upper quadrant discomfort and nausea
advice: Liver function tests. Echocardiogram. Consult gastroenterologist.

description: Throbbing in abdomen felt on palpation
advice: Urgent ultrasound abdomen. Vascular surgical referral.
Rule out aortic dissection urgently — CT chest required.

description: Sudden severe ripping pain in the back
advice: Emergency — call ambulance immediately. Life-threatening.
Urgent blood tests and specialist review required.

description: Pulsatile tinnitus — hearing heartbeat in ear
advice: Carotid Doppler and ENT assessment recommended.

description: Pleuritic chest pain worsened by inspiration
advice: ECG, D-dimer, echo. Rule out PE urgently.
Note relationship to exertion. If exertional — seek cardiac review.

description: Typical ischaemic chest pain with radiation
advice: EMERGENCY. Call 112. Aspirin 300mg if not allergic.

description: Breathlessness brought on by physical activity
advice: Cardiopulmonary exercise test. Echo and spirometry.
Urgent renal and cardiac evaluation. Fluid balance monitoring.

symptom: severe high pulse rate after rest
advice: 12-lead ECG. Blood tests including thyroid function.
Stop exercise. Seek immediate cardiac evaluation.

condition: Valvular Heart Disease / Congenital Heart Disease
advice: Echocardiogram to characterize murmur. Cardiology referral.
Blood tests. Nutritional assessment. Investigate underlying cause.
Fluid restriction in evenings. Check glucose. Consult physician.
Geriatric assessment. Rule out sepsis and cardiac cause.

description: Unexplained weight loss and night sweats
advice: Full blood count, blood cultures, CXR, specialist review.

condition: Anaemia / Heart Failure / Hypothyroidism / Electrolyte Imbalance
advice: Blood tests panel. ECG. Rule out reversible causes.
Thyroid function tests. 12-lead ECG.

condition: Acute Coronary Syndrome / Hypoglycaemia / Vagal Response
advice: Treat as cardiac emergency. Check blood glucose.

symptom: acute sudden back pain with hypotension
description: Acute back pain with low BP
advice: Emergency surgery consult. CT aortogram stat.

condition: Right Heart Failure / Cardiac Tamponade / SVC Obstruction
advice: Echocardiogram. Cardiology review urgently.
Restrict fluid. Diuretics. Hepatic and cardiac assessment.
Emergency. Sit upright. Oxygen. IV furosemide. Call ambulance.
Trial of antacid. Cardiology review if persistent.
ECG. Review medications. Medical evaluation if prolonged.
Urgent vascular surgical referral. Do not warm aggressively.
Ophthalmology emergency assessment immediately.
Blood pressure check. Ophthalmology and neurology review.
Holter monitor. Avoid alcohol and caffeine. Cardiology review.

description: Sharp or crushing pain in the chest area
advice: Seek emergency care immediately. Call 112. Chew aspirin if not allergic.

description: Squeezing or pressure sensation in chest
advice: Rest immediately. If unresolved in 5 minutes, seek emergency care.

description: Difficulty breathing, dyspnoea at rest or exertion
advice: Sit upright. Seek medical evaluation urgently.

Sit or lie down. Hydrate. Avoid sudden standing.

description: Sudden loss of consciousness or fainting
advice: Seek immediate evaluation. Avoid driving until cleared.

description: Persistent tiredness not relieved by rest

description: Bilateral swelling of feet and ankles
advice: Elevate legs. Reduce salt intake. Consult physician.

description: Unilateral or bilateral lower limb oedema

description: Pain radiating down the left arm
advice: Call emergency services immediately — classic MI symptom.

description: Aching or pressure in the jaw area
